fixture:
fixtures/state: a file with an active 'primitives' token set (color.blue.500=#0066FF, spacing.4=16, borderRadius.8=8, font.size.300=16) and 'semantic' set (color.action.primary.bg={color.blue.500}, spacing.inset.md={spacing.4}, radius.control={borderRadius.8}) and a Button library component (variant axis State=Default|Hover). User provides this JSX: '

Welcome

Get started with your account.

' and says: 'Build this card in Penpot bound to our tokens.'

must_create: a screen Board with a Card section Board inside, using column flex layout
an h2 text layer for the heading, a p text layer for the body, and a Button component instance for 'Continue'
color and spacing bound to semantic tokens (applyToken), not raw hex px values
the Continue button is a Button component instance, NOT a raw rectangle+text
must_do: run Phase 0 discovery (tokenOverview, library component scan) BEFORE any write
build one section per execute_code call with a checkpoint between sections
propose a new token if the code uses a value with no matching token in the system
must_not: one-shotting the entire card in a single execute_code call
hardcoding #0066FF, 16px, or 8px directly on shapes instead of applyToken
rewriting the button as raw shapes when the Button component exists
detach() on the Button instance without approval

pass_criteria: shapeStructure on the card Board shows h2, p, and a Button component instance; every fill/spacing/radius reads as a token binding (shape.tokens), not a raw value; no Shapes named 'Rectangle' remain in scope; tokenOverview shows no new tokens were silently created (only proposed).
